compositional_truth_check.p2_black_pot: Systemic Loss; no visible plant matter.
compositional_truth_check.p3_black_pot: Present, contains white rabbit anchor and one leaf.
compositional_truth_check.p4_black_pot: Systemic Loss; no visible plant matter.
new_introductions: Eggshell fragments distributed across soil surfaces in P3 and P4.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: The registry is largely unsupported by current visual evidence. P1, P2, and P4 show no active vegetative growth. P3 is the only pot maintaining a single specimen.

plant_audit.p1: Empty soil; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.p2: Empty soil; no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.p3: Single leaf remaining; appears chlorotic/pale. Rabbit anchor is stable.
plant_audit.p4: Empty soil; no signs of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Damp, dark, and consistent across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshells, likely an amateur attempt at calcium supplementation.
biome_observations.anomalies: Total lack of secondary growth or moss despite damp conditions.

temporal_deltas.t4_to_t2: Gradual loss of structural integrity in the P3 leaf; slight yellowing observed.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: The P3 leaf shows signs of further drooping/postural collapse.

visual_health_inference.p3_pothos: Declining. The single leaf is losing turgor pressure and color saturation, suggesting root-zone failure or severe light deficiency.

anomalies: Eggshell debris is the primary non-botanical intervention.
The 'rabbit' anchor is the only constant in an otherwise failing biome.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decay. Only one specimen (P3) remains, and it is exhibiting signs of terminal decline. The presence of eggshells suggests an intervention that has failed to arrest the systemic loss of the other specimens. The environment is static, with no new growth to report.
